pattern: Once you know each element's destination index in the target order, the minimum swaps equal the array length minus the number of cycles in that permutation.
hints: Build the target ordering by digit sum, breaking ties by the number itself.
Map every current position to the position its element must end up in; that mapping is a permutation.
A permutation split into c cycles needs (length - c) swaps to sort.

edge_inputs.description: all equal digit sums, ordered by value
reversed order forms one long cycle

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, size))
    pool = rng.sample(range(1, 1000000000), n)
    return [pool]
